name: Balen Shah
bio: Former Kathmandu Mayor, ex-rapper, and civil engineer. Known for transforming Kathmandu's footpaths and draining illegal structures. Now set to become Nepal's next Prime Minister.

name: Rabi Lamichhane
bio: Former TV journalist turned politician who founded RSP in 2022. Known for his anti-corruption crusade. Won Chitwan-2 for the third consecutive time.

name: Swarnim Wagle
bio: One of Nepal's most respected economists and former NPC vice-chairman. Won with 15,911 votes, bringing technocratic expertise into the new parliament.

name: Mahabir Pun
bio: Tech activist who spent decades bringing the internet to remote mountain villages. Won as an independent, proving that credibility beats party loyalty.

name: Ranju Darshana Nyaupane
bio: Was the very first candidate in the entire country to receive an official victory certificate, winning Kathmandu-1 with 15,455 votes.
